title: casearia athenaea
intro: Casearia athenaea, also known as the Bitter Casearia, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its bitter compounds which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Casearia athenaea include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. The herbal preparations of Casearia athenaea typically involve the leaves and bark being dried and then made into teas, infusions, or capsules for consumption.
